warps.notes: Left exit door tile — returns to Ecruteak City
Right exit door tile — returns to Ecruteak City
Staircase up to 2F. Hidden behind changeblock until EVENT_GOT_RAINBOW_WING is set — tile is floor ($09) without Rainbow Wing, stairs ($20) with it.

notes: The staircase at (10,2) is initially hidden — tile changed to floor block by TinTower1FStairsCallback when EVENT_GOT_RAINBOW_WING is NOT set.
Sage5 at (9,1) stands in front of (below) the hidden stair tile; he gives the Rainbow Wing, which triggers an earthquake and reveals the stairs.
Three beasts appear at (9,9) [Suicune], (7,9) [Raikou], (12,9) [Entei] before EVENT_FOUGHT_SUICUNE.
Eusine appears at (8,3) after EVENT_FOUGHT_HO_OH is set.
Sage1/2/3 (wise-trio group 1) scatter around the floor; Sage4/5/6 (wise-trio group 2) are near the northern stairs.
After Suicune battle: Eusine and three sages enter from south door for post-battle cutscene.

npcs.name: Suicune
npcs.notes: Appears when EVENT_FOUGHT_SUICUNE is NOT set and EVENT_GOT_RAINBOW_WING is NOT set. Triggers SCENE_TINTOWER1F_SUICUNE_BATTLE cutscene on map entry.

npcs.name: Raikou
npcs.notes: Appears alongside Suicune in the beast introduction scene, unless player already caught Raikou (MonCheck). Flees after cry.

npcs.name: Entei
npcs.notes: Appears alongside Suicune in the beast introduction scene, unless player already caught Entei (MonCheck). Flees after cry.

npcs.name: Eusine
npcs.notes: Appears after EVENT_FOUGHT_HO_OH is set. Uses SPRITE_SUPER_NERD. Post-battle dialogue: congratulates player on Suicune encounter, mentions Ho-Oh legend.
npcs.dialogue_summary: EUSINE: Awesome! Too awesome, even! I've never seen a battle that great... I heard SUICUNE's mystic power summons a rainbow-colored #MON. Later, <PLAYER>!

npcs.name: Sage (Wise Trio 1)
npcs.notes: First group sage. Visible when EVENT_TIN_TOWER_1F_WISE_TRIO_1 is set. Part of the pre-Rainbow Wing period.
npcs.dialogue_summary: When the souls of #MON and humans commune, from the heavens descends a #MON of rainbow colors... Could it mean the legendary #MON are testing us humans?

npcs.name: Sage (Wise Trio 1)
npcs.notes: Second group sage (wise trio 1). Tells the legend of the three beasts rising from the Brass Tower fire.
npcs.dialogue_summary: When the BRASS TOWER burned down, three nameless #MON perished. HO-OH descended and gave new life to them — SUICUNE, ENTEI, and RAIKOU.

npcs.name: Sage (Wise Trio 1)
npcs.notes: Third group sage (wise trio 1). Speaks about the two towers built 700 years ago.
npcs.dialogue_summary: The two TOWERS were built to foster friendship and hope between #MON and people. That was 700 years ago.

npcs.name: Sage (Wise Trio 2)
npcs.notes: Post-Suicune-battle sage group. Paces up/down with 1-step range.
npcs.dialogue_summary: HO-OH appears to have descended upon this, the TIN TOWER! (pre-Ho-Oh) / The legendary #MON embody lightning, fire, and rain — the three forces that struck the BRASS TOWER. (post-Ho-Oh)

npcs.name: Sage (Wise Trio 2 — Rainbow Wing Giver)
npcs.notes: Key sage. When approached without EVENT_GOT_RAINBOW_WING: gives RAINBOW_WING, triggers earthquake, reveals staircase via changeblock (10,2) to $20. After wing given: 'Now, go.' After EVENT_FOUGHT_HO_OH: tells legend of beasts fleeing from frightened people.
npcs.dialogue_summary: Pre-wing: 'This will protect you. Take it.' [gives Rainbow Wing, earthquakes, stairs revealed] Post-wing: 'Now, go.' Post-Ho-Oh: legends about the beasts ignoring frightened people.

npcs.name: Sage (Wise Trio 2)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Free your mind from uncertainty, and advance. (pre-Ho-Oh) / SUICUNE is said to be the closest to HO-OH, and may share a bond with UNOWN. (post-Ho-Oh)

events.description: If EVENT_GOT_RAINBOW_WING NOT set and EVENT_BEAT_ELITE_FOUR set and BeastsCheck passes: Raikou and Entei approach player and flee crying, then Suicune approaches for level-40 battle (BATTLETYPE_SUICUNE). After battle: Eusine + 3 sages enter from south door for cutscene. Sets EVENT_FOUGHT_SUICUNE and clears beasts from all prior encounter routes.
TinTower1FStairsCallback: on every map load, if EVENT_GOT_RAINBOW_WING is NOT set, tile at (10,2) is changed to floor block $09, hiding the staircase. With Rainbow Wing, tile becomes $20 (stairs).

Sage5 script: gives RAINBOW_WING item, triggers earthquake (72 frames), plays STRENGTH SFX, changes block (10,2) to $20, refreshes map, sets EVENT_GOT_RAINBOW_WING. Switches wise-trio group from group-1 NPCs to group-2 NPCs.

TinTower1FNPCsCallback: if EVENT_GOT_RAINBOW_WING set and EVENT_FOUGHT_HO_OH set, Eusine appears. If not got Rainbow Wing: check Elite Four beaten + BeastsCheck — if passed, clears WISE_TRIO_1, sets WISE_TRIO_2. If beasts NOT ready: Suicune/Raikou/Entei appear/disappear based on MonCheck.

After Suicune battle: Eusine moves in from x=10,y=15; sages 1-3 enter and position around player. Eusine delivers long dialogue praising the battle and prophesying Ho-Oh's appearance. Sets scene to NOOP afterward.

access_requirements.to_enter: Must pass the Ecruteak Tin Tower Entrance gatekeepers (requires Fog Badge at minimum, Clear Bell during Radio Tower crisis).
access_requirements.to_ascend: Rainbow Wing required. Sage5 on 1F gives it after Suicune battle pre-conditions. Stairs are hidden until Rainbow Wing is obtained.
access_requirements.note: In Pokemon Crystal, Suicune must be encountered here (Tin Tower 1F) as part of its roaming chain before Ho-Oh can be challenged on the roof.

notes: Tin Tower 1F is the ground floor of the nine-story Bell Tower (called Tin Tower in Crystal). It is 10x9 blocks (20x18 tiles). The floor hosts the famous Suicune encounter cutscene — Raikou and Entei appear briefly and flee, then Suicune faces the player in battle at level 40 with the unique BATTLETYPE_SUICUNE. The three legendary beasts (Suicune at 9,9; Raikou at 7,9; Entei at 12,9) are conditional objects managed by TinTower1FNPCsCallback. After the Suicune battle, Eusine and three sages enter for a cutscene. Sage5 at (9,1) is the key NPC who gives the Rainbow Wing and reveals the hidden staircase to 2F. The two wise-trio groups (group-1: sages 1-3 scattered around the floor before Suicune battle; group-2: sages 4-6 near north after the battle) are mutually exclusive. The exit south at (9-10, 15) returns to Ecruteak City (warp 12).
